title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, to discuss upcoming IPOs for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The conversation covers the business implications of going public, differences between the companies, capital requirements, and the broader landscape of AI company development.
